THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR HEARING TO APRIL 15, 2025 AND COUNSEL REPRESENTED THEY WOULD REVISE THE PARAGRAPH. COUNSEL HAVE NOT SUBMITTED A REVISED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OR FURTHER CLARIFICATION. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class And Paga Action Settlement Agreement, Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, And Service Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Final Approval
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MEJIA'S Motion For Final Approval Of Joint Stipulation Of Class And PAGA Action Settlement Agreement, Attorneys' Fees And Expenses, And Service Award.

The unopposed motion for final approval is granted. Counsel to submit a proposed order including required findings, and a separate proposed judgment. The proposed order should include a date for a final compliance hearing and an order that the settlement administrator provide a declaration attesting to distribution of all settlement proceeds at least five court days in advance of the final compliance hearing date.

Proposed order submitted

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order (1) Preliminarily Approving The Class Action Settlement; (2) Approving Notice Of Settlement; And (3) Setting Hearing For Final Approval
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MEJIA, AN INDIVIDUAL ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For An Order (1) Preliminarily Approving The Class Action Settlement; (2) Approving Notice Of Settlement; And (3) Setting Hearing For Final Approval.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for preliminary approval is granted. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed order with all necessary findings and a final approval hearing date. Plaintiff shall first circulate the proposed order pursuant to Rule of Court 3.1312.

Order submitted. A final approval hearing is set for November 18, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in department 301.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order (1) Preliminarily Approving The Calss Action Settlement; (2) Approving Notice Of Settlement; And (3) Setting Hearing For Final Approval
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL MEJIA, AN INDIVIDUAL ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Motion For An Order (1) Preliminarily Approving The Calss Action Settlement; (2) Approving Notice Of Settlement; And (3) Setting Hearing For Final Approval.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. On April 1, 2025, the court heard Plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval and requested clarification of paragraph 3.2.3 of the parties' settlement agreement. The court continued the matter for hearing to April 15, 2025 and counsel represented they would revise the paragraph. Counsel have not submitted a revised settlement agreement or further clarification.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
